evals.prompt: I need subdomain enum for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the ct-subdomain-enumerator skill for this ct subdomain enumerator request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects ct-subdomain-enumerator for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_ct_enumerate.
Keeps the response focused on enumerating subdomains through Certificate Transparency logs for reconnaissance and cyberspace mapping.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused ct subdomain enumerator workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the ct-subdomain-enumerator skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects ct-subdomain-enumerator instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
